description_long: This object is a chess set displayed on a square wooden board with a light-colored playing surface and a dark wood border. The set includes two full armies of chess pieces, one in a light wood tone and the other in a grayish color, each arranged in their starting positions. The pieces are intricately modeled, with distinguishable features for pawns, rooks, knights, bishops, queens, and kings, each with detailed crowns, crosses, and horse heads. The board is slightly elevated, giving it a sturdy and elegant appearance suitable for display or play. The chess pieces have a classic Staunton-inspired design, with rounded bases and ornamental tops. The overall presentation suggests a decorative and functional object, ideal for use in public parks, urban plazas, or community centers.
description: A detailed chess set with light and dark pieces arranged on a square wooden board with a light playing surface and dark border. The pieces are intricately modeled and visually distinct.
description_view_0: Front view showing both armies of chess pieces facing each other on the board, with the light pieces in the background and the dark pieces in the foreground.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the two rows of pieces from each side, emphasizing the symmetry and alignment of the chess set.
description_view_2: Rear view with the light pieces in the foreground and the dark pieces in the background, mirroring the front view but from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the chess pieces from the other lateral perspective, highlighting the arrangement and spacing between the two armies.
